# Nayra

> Deep-time timeline visualization for the browser. Renders 10,000+ events at 60 FPS across scales from microseconds to billions of years using BigInt arithmetic and a Canvas-based renderer.

Nayra is a specification-driven SPA that handles the full range of geological, historical, and cosmological time in a single interactive timeline. Built with vanilla JavaScript and the Canvas API — no frameworks.

## Documentation

- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): Project overview and architecture summary
- [docs/architecture.md](docs/architecture.md): Rendering pipeline, BigInt time model, and performance design
- [docs/browser-support.md](docs/browser-support.md): Browser compatibility and BigInt requirements
- [docs/troubleshooting.md](docs/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and debugging

## Authorship

All code in this repository was generated by a large language model. Human contribution: requirements, design decisions, planning, and review.

*[Leer en español](https://charly-vibes.github.io/charly-vibes/)*
